pages.text: The Export Bus pushes a matching item from the network into the container on its front face. Its other faces connect to the network but do not export.
See $(l:magic_storage:recipes)Recipe Catalog$() for the exact crafting layout.

Right-click with an item to set the $(thing)filter$(); right-click with an empty hand to clear it. Item properties matter, so a damaged or enchanted tool may not match a plain one. A compatible wrench rotates the Bus instead of changing the filter.

Every 10 ticks, the Bus offers up to one stack and removes only what the target accepts. If the target is full, the item remains in network storage. The Bus pauses when its Core is missing, unloaded, or conflicted.

Use separate Export Buses for furnace feeds, sorting lines, or machines that need steady input. Point each front face at its destination, set a filter, and test with a small stack before leaving the system unattended.
